mapper.insert: /* SmsMgmtMapper.insertSmsTemplateHst */ INSERT INTO MSP_SMS_TEMPLATE_HST ( RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ,TEMPLATE_ID ,TEMPLATE_NM ,TEMPLATE_DSC ,MGMT_ORGN_ID ,WORK_TYPE ,MSG_TYPE ,CALLBACK ,SUBJECT ,TEXT ,EXPIRE_HOUR ,RETRY ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM ) SELECT RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ,TEMPLATE_ID ,TEMPLATE_NM ,TEMPLATE_DSC ,MGMT_ORGN_ID ,WORK_TYPE ,MSG_TYPE ,CALLBACK ,SUBJECT ,TEXT ,EXPIRE_HOUR ,RETRY ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM FROM MSP_SMS_TEMPLATE_MST WHERE TEMPLATE_ID = #{templateId}
mapper.select:
/* SmsMgmtMapper.getTemplateCombo */ SELECT TEMPLATE_ID AS VALUE , TEMPLATE_NM AS TEXT FROM MSP_SMS_TEMPLATE_MST A WHERE 1 = 1
AND INSTR(A.TEXT, '#') = 0
AND A.WORK_TYPE IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0069' AND ETC2 = 'Y')
ORDER BY 1 DESC

/* SmsMgmtMapper.getRateCombo */ SELECT A.RATE_CD AS VALUE , A.RATE_NM AS TEXT FROM MSP_RATE_MST A WHERE A.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN A.APPL_STRT_DT AND A.APPL_END_DT ORDER BY A.PAY_CL_CD, A.APPL_STRT_DT DESC, A.RATE_NM ASC

/* SmsMgmtMapper.getSendTemplate */ SELECT TEMPLATE_ID AS templateId ,TEMPLATE_NM AS templateNm ,TEXT AS text ,CALLBACK AS callbackNum ,SUBJECT AS subject FROM MSP_SMS_TEMPLATE_MST WHERE TEMPLATE_ID = #{templateId}

/* ====== smsMgmtMapper.smsSendPhoneGrpDtl =========*/ SELECT A.GRP_ID --그룹코드 , A.GRP_NM --그룹명 , A.USR_ID --사용자ID , A.USR_NM --사용자명 , A.MBLPHN_NUM --전화번호 , A.USR_ID AS USR_ID_MSK --사용자ID , A.USR_NM AS USR_NM_MSK --사용자명 , A.MBLPHN_NUM AS MBLPHN_NUM_MSK --전화번호 , A.REGST_ID , A.REGST_DTTM FROM MSP_SMS_PHONE_GRP_DTL A WHERE A.GRP_ID = #{grpId} ORDER BY A.REGST_DTTM
mapper.insert: /* ====== smsMgmtMapper.insertSmsSendPhoneGrpDtl =========*/ INSERT INTO MSP_SMS_PHONE_GRP_DTL ( GRP_ID , GRP_NM , USR_ID , USR_NM , MBLPHN_NUM , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{grpId} , (SELECT GRP_NM FROM MSP_SMS_PHONE_GRP_MST WHERE GRP_ID = #{grpId}) , #{usrId} , (SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = #{usrId}) , (SELECT MBLPHN_NUM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = #{usrId}) , #{SESSION_USER_ID} , SYSDATE )

/* ====== smsMgmtMapper.insertSmsSendPhoneGrpDtlHst =========*/ INSERT INTO MSP_SMS_PHONE_GRP_DTL_HST ( SEQ_NUM , GRP_ID , GRP_NM , USR_ID , USR_NM , MBLPHN_NUM , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , OPER_TYPE ) VALUES ( SEQ_PHONE_GRP_DTL_HST.NEXTVAL , #{grpId} , (SELECT GRP_NM FROM MSP_SMS_PHONE_GRP_MST WHERE GRP_ID = #{grpId}) , #{usrId} , (SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = #{usrId}) , (SELECT MBLPHN_NUM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = #{usrId}) , #{SESSION_USER_ID} , SYSDATE , #{operType} )
mapper.select: /* smsMgmtMapper.getMsgSmsSendListDt */ SELECT MSG_NO AS MSG_NO /* 문자NO */ ,MSG_SEND_CTN AS MSG_SEND_CTN /* 보내는 사람 */ ,MSG_RECV_CTN AS MSG_RECV_CTN /* 받는 사람 */ ,MSG_TITLE AS MSG_TITLE /* 제목 */ ,MSG_TEXT AS MSG_TEXT /* 내용 */ FROM MSG_SMS_SEND_LIST WHERE MSG_NO = #{msgNo} ORDER BY MSG_RECV_CTN ASC

INSERT /* smsMgmtMapper.insertMsgSmsTmp */ INTO MSG_SMS_LIST( MSG_NO /* 문자NO */ , MSG_TYPE /* 문자타입 */ , SUBJECT /* 제목 */ , REQUEST_TIME /* 예약전송시간 */ , REGST_ID /* 등록자 */ , REGST_TIME /* 등록시간 */ , MSG_SMS_TYPE /* S:같은내용 D:다른내용 */ , MSG_TMP_ID /* 템플릿ID */ , MSG_USG_YN /* 사용여부YN */ , RESULT_YN /* 처리결과YN */ , KAKAO_YN /* 카카오YN */ ) VALUES ( #{msgNo} /* 문자NO */ , #{msgType} /* 문자타입 */ , #{subject} /* 제목 */ , #{requestTime} /* 예약전송시간 */ , #{regstId} /* 등록자 */ , SYSDATE /* 등록시간 */ , #{msgSmsType} /* S:같은내용 D:다른내용 */ , #{msgTmpId} /* 템플릿ID */ , 'Y' /* 사용여부YN */ , 'N' /* 처리결과YN */ , #{kakaoYn} /* 카카오YN */ )

/* smsMgmtMapper.reqTimeCountChk */ SELECT CASE WHEN TRUNC((TO_DATE(#{requestTime}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 24 * 60) > 30 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS CHK_YN , COUNT(*) AS OVER_LAP FROM MSG_SMS_LIST WHERE REQUEST_TIME = #{requestTime} AND MSG_USG_YN = 'Y'
/* SmsMgmtMapper.isOtpUseKt */ SELECT USG_YN FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'DEV0000' AND CD_VAL = 'OTPUSEKT'

/* SmsMgmtMapper.getTemplateText */ SELECT text AS templateText ,subject AS templateSubject ,template_id AS templateId ,callback AS callbackNum FROM MSP_SMS_TEMPLATE_MST WHERE TEMPLATE_ID = #{templateId}
mapper.insert: /* SmsMgmtMapper.getMsgDetailDt */ INSERT INTO AM2X_SUBMIT (MSG_ID, SUBJECT, MSG_TYPE, MSG_TYPE_SECOND, SCHEDULE_TIME, SUBMIT_TIME, MESSAGE, CALLBACK_NUM, RCPT_DATA, FAIL_SEND, K_TMPLCODE ,K_MESSAGE, K_SENDERKEY,RESERVED01, RESERVED02, RESERVED03) SELECT AM2X_SUBMIT_SEQ.NEXTVAL ,SUBJECT ,MSG_TYPE ,MSG_TYPE_SECOND ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ,MESSAGE ,CALLBACK_NUM ,RCPT_DATA ,FAIL_SEND ,K_TMPLCODE ,K_MESSAGE ,K_SENDERKEY ,#{reserved01} ,#{reserved02} ,#{reserved03} FROM AM2X_SUBMIT_LOG WHERE MSG_ID = #{msgId}
